facts_build_stage_471495436461.content: Verification-only tasks (no code changes) still require full exploration — the agent traced executeDecompose and createWorktree in dist/bin/cli.js before confirming behavior.

facts_decompose_pipeline_471497205161.content: Decompose pipeline design: executeDecompose returns either sub-tasks (parallel branch) or null (fallback trigger), making the null path the explicit fallback signal.

conventions_engine_dist_artifact_4714991.content: Decompose verification targets live in dist/bin/cli.js rather than src — line numbers like 18529 and 19071 reference the compiled output.
